subcodes.first_line: O ye who call out in the name of God, the Protecting, the Self-Subsisting! In these days, the arrows of hatred from all directions [3.5s]... ...The martyr, Haji Mirza Jani, had written a few chapters, brief and incomplete, on the history of the Faith. These were in the possession of Aqa Muhammad-Rida, the nephew of Dhabih
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنادون باسم الله المهیمن القیوم در این ایام سهام بغضا از جمیع انحا...  این ایام تازگی امت بیحیا خدعه‌ئی نموده‌اند و مکر و دسیسه‌ئی مجری داشته‌اند
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @rejection, opposition and persecution
